states.label: Complaint Received
states.description: Report of unauthorised construction received and logged

states.label: Site Visit Scheduled
states.description: Inspector assigned and visit date set

states.label: Under Investigation
states.description: Site visited, breach confirmed or assessment ongoing
required_actions: Issue PCN if information needed from owner
Check conservation area and listed status

states.label: PCN Issued
states.description: Planning Contravention Notice served — awaiting response

states.label: Enforcement Notice Served
states.description: Formal enforcement notice issued with compliance deadline

states.label: Appeal Lodged
states.description: Owner has appealed the enforcement notice to the Planning Inspectorate

states.label: Compliance Monitoring
states.description: Monitoring compliance with enforcement notice or approved works

states.label: Prosecution Proceedings
states.description: Non-compliance — prosecution case being prepared

states.label: Case Resolved
states.description: Breach remedied or enforcement action concluded

states.label: Complaint Received
states.description: Report of unauthorised works to listed building
required_actions: URGENT: Site visit same day or next working day
Check listing details on Historic England register

states.label: Urgent Investigation
states.description: Site visited — assessing nature and extent of works
required_actions: Document all works with photos and video
Assess whether works constitute criminal offence
If criminal offence: notify police within 24 hours
Issue Temporary Stop Notice if works ongoing

states.label: Temporary Stop Notice
states.description: TSN served — all works must cease for 28 days
required_actions: Begin prosecution file if criminal offence confirmed
Submit prosecution file to legal within 14 working days

states.label: LB Enforcement Notice
states.description: Listed Building Enforcement Notice served requiring reinstatement

states.label: Appeal Lodged
states.description: Owner appealing enforcement notice
required_actions: Commission heritage impact assessment if needed

states.label: Criminal Prosecution
states.description: Prosecution under Section 9 of the Listed Buildings Act

states.label: Compliance Monitoring
states.description: Monitoring reinstatement or compliance
required_actions: Heritage officer site visit to verify reinstatement quality

states.label: Case Resolved
states.description: Works ceased and reinstatement completed or prosecution concluded

states.label: Complaint Received
states.description: Report of unauthorised change of use
required_actions: Schedule site visit (5 working days for high priority)

states.label: Site Visit Scheduled
states.description: Visit arranged to verify use
required_actions: Visit at time when alleged use is occurring (e.g., evening for late-night use)

states.label: Under Investigation
states.description: Use confirmed or under assessment
required_actions: Cross-refer to Environmental Health if noise/smoke/odour

states.label: PCN Issued
states.description: Planning Contravention Notice served

states.label: Enforcement Notice Served
states.description: Notice requiring cessation of unauthorised use

states.label: Compliance Monitoring
states.description: Checking whether use has ceased
required_actions: Site visit within 7 days of compliance deadline

states.label: Prosecution
states.description: Non-compliance with enforcement notice — prosecution proceedings

states.label: Case Resolved
states.description: Unauthorised use ceased or enforcement concluded

states.label: Complaint Received
states.description: Report of condition breach
required_actions: Identify specific conditions alleged to be breached

states.label: Site Visit Scheduled
states.description: Visit arranged to verify condition compliance
required_actions: Visit at time relevant to condition (e.g., after 10pm for hours condition)

states.label: Under Investigation
states.description: Assessing whether condition is breached and harm level
required_actions: Commission specialist assessment if needed (noise, odour)

states.label: Specialist Assessment
states.description: Awaiting noise/odour/technical assessment

states.label: Breach of Condition Notice
states.description: BCN served — no right of appeal, immediate compliance required
required_actions: Note: BCN has NO right of appeal

states.label: Compliance Monitoring
states.description: Checking whether conditions are now met

states.label: Prosecution
states.description: Non-compliance with BCN — prosecution proceedings

states.label: Case Resolved
states.description: Conditions now complied with or enforcement concluded
